validation: de Vahl Davis differentially-heated cavity (Boussinesq natural convection)
solver: hand-rolled thermal LBM (D2Q9 flow + D2Q5 heat, Guo-forced Boussinesq), JAX/GPU
note: Nu error decreases with Ra (+15% @1e3 -> +8% @1e4 -> +4% @1e5): the full-way anti-bounce-back wall placement is an O(1) offset that matters less as convection dominates. Velocity field matches benchmark; Ra-scaling correct. Absolute Nu carries a modest BC bias; relative h(angle) trends are reliable.
